title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
We undertake export collections and negotiations of documents under letter of credit. With our dedicated customer service the turnaround time is greatly reduced, thereby improving your cash flow. 
All your import collections including documents received directly by you can be speedily and efficiently handled by us and payments can be effected through our vast correspondent network.

metadata.description: IDBI Bank offers a wide range of products from savings and current bank account to loans for retail and msme customers  or agri loans to farmers. Apply Now.
metadata.keywords: Internet Banking, savings account, Debit Card, personal loans, home loans, loans, fixed deposits
